title: antirrhinum majus subsp. litigiosum
intro: Antirrhinum majus subsp. litigiosum, commonly known as the litigious snapdragon or yellow snapdragon, is a plant species within the antirrhinum genus. The plant's medicinal properties include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of antirrhinum majus subsp. litigiosum include its potential in reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, or topical creams for various health applications.
